series_metadata.series_title: Dealer Motor Vehicle Shows and Displays
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes all documents that are received from dealers and sponsors requesting the display of motor vehicles by dealership(s), and any correspondence from the BMV.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retained for three months from upload date. ; Electronic: Retain for two years from date of display/show., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
